markdownRemark.excerpt: Towards the end of 2011 the company I was working for was looking to shed some of its workforce starting with a round of voluntary redudancies. I hadn’t enjoyed…
markdownRemark.html:
Towards the end of 2011 the company I was working for was looking to shed some of its workforce starting with a round of voluntary redudancies. I hadn’t enjoyed the position for years, and so I was one of the first to put up my hands to take the redundancy. In the final weeks of the position, I prepared for what was to become my “gap year” - a year to idle back and focus on something I’d wanted to do for a long time; try to build a game engine.

In the 12 months leading up to this event I’d had an interesting turn of events - my girlfriend and I had ended a long term relationship, I’d moved into share housing, and I was enjoying all the newfound freedoms that came with this type of arrangements. I no longer had a job, and my expenses were super-low.

frontmatter.title: Cross platform 2.5D side scrolling game engine
Farmhand: A multi-function monitor for precision agriculture
